title: Create Numismatics: Crafting Recipes
description: Adds crafting recipes for spurs, cogs, bevels, etc.
body:
Adds a recipe for spurs, cogs, bevels, etc. 

Adds a incomplete variant of spurs, cogs, bevels, etc. in the assembly transition state :
